title: Ruined Heart: Another Love Story Between A Criminal & A Whore
overview: A merciless hit man rescues a prostitute from a violent incident in a Philippine slum before the two take flight.  Though Khavn, a standard-bearer of the digital age in the Philippines, has already established himself as a director of countless films, he is also an accomplished poet and musician. The bewildering visuals and punk-opera soundtrack expertly convey a world that extends far beyond the dialogue. As the story unfolds, a poetic sentiment wafts out of the chaos, signaling a collision of the director’s many talents.
